data.value: Won the 2026 PDC World Championship for his second consecutive title at just 18 years old. Odds-on at 4/5 for a third straight title. Performing under pressure like a seasoned pro at historic levels.

2026 finalist and world number two at 6/1 — the most credible threat to Littler's streak. Reached the business end of most majors in the past 12 months. The Battle of the Lukes is the defining storyline.
Three-time world champion now listed as big as 20/1, reflecting inconsistent form and inability to close in major finals recently. Once the dominant force, now well down the betting hierarchy.
